'''DS-55-2''' was the [[Callsign/Legends|call sign]] of an [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] [[TIE pilot]] who served<ref name="CSWE" /> by [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], the Alliance attempted to destroy the Imperial [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|DS-1 Orbital Battle Station]] [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]] during the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> DS-55-2 fought in the battle,<ref name="CSWE" /> alongside numerous other [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] that attempted to defend the [[Battle station/Legends|battle station]] from the attacking Alliance [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]]. Ultimately, the [[TIE series/Legends|TIE]] fighters were unsuccessful in defending the [[Space station/Legends|station]], which was destroyed in the subsequent Alliance victory over the Empire.<ref name="ANH">{{Film|IV}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:DS-55-2.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The image used by the ''Battle of Yavin'' set of the ''Star Wars Trading Card Game'' to represent DS-55-2 was of a TIE fighter that was previously identified as Black 4, piloted by DS-61-4.]]
The "DS-55-2" name was coined by the [[2003]] [[Battle of Yavin (TCG)|''Battle of Yavin'']] expansion of [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s ''[[Star Wars Trading Card Game]]''. Identified as the designation of a TIE fighter in the card game,<ref name="TCG">{{TCG|set=Battle of Yavin|cardname=TIE Fighter DS-55-2|link=https://swtcg.com/Content/Images/Cards/BOY/TIE_Fighter_DS_55_2.webp?v=2}}</ref> [[2008]]'s ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' would later establish that name as the call sign of the corresponding TIE [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]].<ref name="CSWE" /> This article assumes the latter source is correct.

Furthermore, the ''Star Wars Trading Card Game'' uses a film still<ref name="TCG" /> of a TIE fighter that was previously identified as [[Black 4]],<ref name="B4card">{{CCG|set=A New Hope Limited|cardname=Black 4}}</ref> piloted by [[DS-61-4]], in the [[1996]] ''[[A New Hope Limited]]'' expansion set of [[Decipher]]'s [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].<ref name="DS614card">{{CCG|set=A New Hope Limited|cardname=DS-61-4}}</ref> This article treats the ''Star Wars Trading Card Game'' identification of DS-55-2 as an error and further refrains from linking the subject to any of the onscreen TIE fighters shown in the Battle of Yavin scenes of the [[1977]] [[original trilogy]] film, [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']].
